name: My boss is mad I filed workers comp - can they fire me?

mainEntity.name: My boss is mad I filed workers comp - can they fire me?

acceptedAnswer.description: Utah prohibits retaliation for filing legitimate claims.[2] Context: Firing for injury report illegal; protections strong.[2] Key factors: Prove timing link; document threats. Practical guidance: Report to Labor Commission; keep job search records if terminated. Sue for reinstatement/damages. Don't quit voluntarily.
